# Markdown Converter

> A free web application that converts documents (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, EPUB, images, audio) into clean Markdown text. Built on Microsoft's markitdown library.

## What it does

Accepts file uploads or URLs and converts them to Markdown (.md) format using Microsoft's open-source `markitdown` Python library (https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown).

## Supported formats

PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, XLS, HTML, HTM, URL (web page), CSV, EPUB, TXT, JSON, XML, JPG, PNG, WAV, MP3, ZIP, MSG, RSS, MD

## Key features

- Free, no registration required
- Batch conversion: up to 10 files, 50MB each
- Real-time Markdown preview editor
- Download as .md or batch ZIP
- Privacy-first: files never stored on server
- Multi-language: English, Indonesian, Japanese, Arabic, Chinese
- Optional LLM-powered OCR

## Technology stack

- Backend: Python 3.12, FastAPI
- Conversion engine: microsoft/markitdown
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript

## Privacy policy summary

All file processing is in-memory. No files are written to disk or retained. Data is immediately discarded after conversion.
